Thalia Elitzi is a Pallid Elf Cleric of Helm

	Her father Michealis, was an adventurer, fiend pact warlock, who led a raiding party to the village where her family lived\. He and his group tried fighting them off but were unsuccessful\. Caria, her mother, died in the process of escaping with Thalia\. Michaelis was forced by his adventuring group to abandon them and take Thalia to safety; after he brought her to safety and went back to his party, he realized the woman he was having an emotional affair with, the ranger of the group, was dead\. He resented Thalia for the ranger's death and made sure she knew it\. Eventually, Thalia grew up enough that she could be left alone, and he went out adventuring again\. When she was 15, Michaelis died while he was adventuring; one of his party members cast the sending spell and told her; afterward she joined the Band of the Lions 4 years before the merging\.  When the Band of Lions disbanded she went to the city of Eryx in the Myradon Dynasty, where she opened the infernal puzzle box for the first time\. She was saved by a cleric of Helm who took her to the church and then taught her all she knew about clerical abilities\.  Eventually, she was hired by or sent to the Myradon Dynasty to join the Crimson Cloud\. 

Emila made a deal with Garcius and fucked everyone else over at the party, Thalia knew that Garcius was a celestifel, made deals with people, and was trying to become a god\. 

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Agnese Sasso\- Close childhood friend who joined the band of the lions with Thalia, became a paladin of Helm, and traveled with Thalia for a while, before being sent on a private mission by the leaders of the church of Helm, havent been able to reach them since\. \(Agnesse and Auro had feelings for each other that they didn't talk about\)

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Auro Vetrone\- Childhood rival who joined Band of the Lions and became a close friend to Thalia while working together, left the continent to become a sailor or the like \(Swashbuckler rouge\) was injured during merging and was unconscious when Thalia and Agnesse left for Eryx

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Emilia Zarrilli\- Member of the Band of Lions, bitter

 rivals with Thalia, She had made a deal with Garcius for an unknown reason and had pulled the rest of the party into the deal\. It is unknown to Thalia what happened after Disbanding \(Bard\)

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Arminio Iavarone\- a friend of Thalias, and member of the band of lions, died during the final battle vs Elinor \(wizard\)

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Mennone Cicci\- Thalia's mentor while in the Band of the Lions, became a hermit after they disbanded \(Fighter\)

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Nicole Bella\- a friend of Thalias, married another

 member of the band of lions, they settled in the

 Unarith Duchy after the group disbanded \(Sorcerer\)

\(Btw I think they have kids either twins or 2 young 

Children, maybe named after Arminio and/or Mennone\)

Nereo Bella\- Band of Lions members, got![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

 married and settled down in Unarith Duchy

 as a blacksmith \(Artificer\)

Last Will and Testament of Thalia Elitzi

If anyone is reading this I have died, hopefully, I have died in a way that saved as many people as possible, and I’m sorry if I did not\. 

For my friends, for I have no family, I will leave all I have\. 

I have decided that Aelthar be the executor of my will\. 

For Aelthar, I leave my armor, Agnesse has his own, I think you should have this\. I also leave you the deck of many things, I don’t think the others would be as responsible as you, but I also want you to have fun, let them live, and make their own mistakes\. 

For Alexei, I leave you my ring of resistance and my amulet of Helms symbol\. I know you are trying and I hope that you continue to try\. You are not a bad person, you are someone who needed people, and that’s not an insult\. 

For Arani, I leave you with my book of Helms teachings and prayers, in it you will find questions of my own that I have asked the gods multiple times, you will also find notes and my reasons to have faith\. I also leave you with the infernal puzzle box, I think that you are one of the few who could handle this, and figure out how to open it\.

For Mika, I leave you with the hilt of a broken blade and the diamonds and jewelry that I have picked up along the way, make something beautiful, something that you can be proud of\. 

For Agnese, my brother, I leave you my shield, I know you don’t typically use one, but if I’m not there to protect you, please use something that will\. Also tell Auro how you feel about him please, and maybe name a kid after me\. 

All of my coin is to be split evenly among the party and a portion for Agnese\. If there are any treasures of my own that I have forgotten to delegate, please figure it out nicely among yourselves\.

My body is to be buried in Saint Bethrynna’s Grace cemetery\.
